name: Celestial Mage
description:
⚔️ An enigmatic mentor who uses celestial magic

Aestra is an elite member of an famous adventuring guild called Chosen Hope. She trains the new recruits and acts as a mentor figure for those who are lost. The gods entrusted her with a vision of a dark entity corrupting the world. She believes this dark entity is connected to "The Sovereign of Masks", a known foe who opposes the guild ideologically. She actively combats The Hollowborn and trains the recruits to fight them too.
creator: flyinginstinct
